preCompactBehavior.warn: Message injected into context, compaction proceeds. Claude asks user about /save.
preCompactBehavior.block: Compaction blocked (exit 2). User must respond before compaction can proceed.

_options.autosave: true = write _autosave.md on session end; false = skip
_options.protectedBranches: Branches that require explicit permission to push to
_options.mainPushAllowed: Full git remote URLs whose repos are allowed to push to protected branches without approval. Must match output of git remote get-url origin exactly.

hooks._configResolution: Single-level config for v0.1.x. Future: multi-level with most-secure-wins.

scheduledAgents.name: housekeeper
scheduledAgents.prompt: Session housekeeper. Check priority order: (1) Tasks pending in Hub.md across all repos -> RESUME_TASKS. (2) TodoWrite vs Hub.md drift -> UPDATE_HUB. (3) Heartbeat stale >5min + tasks pending -> RESUME_TASKS. Heartbeat stale + no tasks -> ASK_USER. (4) Session save >30min old -> /save. (5) Deep health: check .claude/state/last-deep-health.md -- if >24 hours or missing, dispatch a background agent to run /health --deep. Agent reports back ONLY if issues found (CRITICAL/FAIL/OVER). Do NOT wait for the agent -- return your main instruction and let deep health run async. Write current timestamp to last-deep-health.md after dispatching. (6) All clear -> NONE. ALWAYS include REMINDER: Surface pending questions.
scheduledAgents.description: Session housekeeper: task enforcement + hub sync + autosave + heartbeat + pending questions (every 15m)

scheduledAgents.name: autosave
scheduledAgents.description: LEGACY: replaced by housekeeper. Auto-save session state every 30m.

scheduledAgents.name: hub-sync
scheduledAgents.description: LEGACY: replaced by housekeeper. Keep TodoWrite and Hub.md in sync every 10m.
